name: SAMA V50 White Mid Tower PC Case, 4x120mm ARGB PWM Fan Pre-Install for Efficient Cooling, Compatible ATX/MATX/ITX Motherboards and Back-Connect Design Supports 360mm Water Cooling and 40 Series GPU
